name: CodePilot
subtitle: Mac coding agent from iPhone
promotionalText: Connect your iPhone to your Mac gateway for beta testing, remote turns, file previews, and remote desktop control.
description:
CodePilot connects your iPhone to a Mac running Codex CLI and the CodePilot gateway, so you can monitor and steer coding-agent work away from your desk.

Use CodePilot to start and follow turns, switch configured accounts, inspect gateway status, preview files, open local Mac web URLs through the gateway, and test remote desktop pairing and control.

This beta is intended for developers who already run Codex CLI, the CodePilot Mac app, and the gateway. You will need a reachable gateway URL and token from your Mac setup.
whatsNew:
CodePilot's iPhone beta now connects more clearly to your Mac gateway, with guided setup states, account status, file previews, local Mac URL opening, and remote desktop pairing.

Improved:
- Clearer gateway recovery messages when a token is missing, the gateway is offline, or auth needs attention.
- Better file-preview handling for local paths and Markdown links.
- Remote desktop status, pairing, input, viewport, and clipboard handling.

Fixed:
- More stable gateway event formatting, turn state handling, and background-session cleanup.
